overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit district of Night City. The player explores the plaza around Lizzie's Bar, walks along wet streets reflecting vibrant pink and cyan neon signs, and crosses through an intersection into a narrow alleyway with dense red signage.

events.description: character looks up at large pink neon figure sign on building facade

agents.ego_description: walking around the plaza area, looking up at the towering neon signs and advertisements above Lizzie's Bar

entered.detail: Large neon sign for Lizzie's Bar with stylized pink and cyan lettering and cat logo
Orange and blue industrial scaffolding structure with metal beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-soaked plaza dominated by the bright neon signage of Lizzie's Bar. The player character walks around the open area, briefly looking up at the towering pink neon figure on the adjacent building. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant cyan and pink neon lights, with industrial scaffolding visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with parked vehicles and residential towers

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past parked cars, moving away from the plaza toward the main road

entered.detail: Tall residential building with blue-lit windows and multiple air conditioning units
Elevated highway or monorail track structure with lights underneath
Large digital advertisement screen showing colorful graphics
Tall street lamp illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the plaza onto a city street, passing a white parked car. The blue apartment tower becomes the dominant structure ahead, while an elevated highway structure is visible to the left. The pink neon figure building remains visible but moves to the left side as the camera progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with construction barriers and overhead pedestrian walkway

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light and crosswalk ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to red and white construction barriers, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: person walking on the sidewalk in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: Red and white striped plastic construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge
Elevated pedestrian walkway crossing over the street ahead with glass sides
Traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
Shop front with illuminated signage and displays

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk bordered by construction barriers on the left, the character approaches an intersection. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the road ahead, and the blue apartment tower shifts to the right side of the frame. The traffic light shows red as the character nears the crosswalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit street with dense urban canyon

events.description: crossing the street at yellow striped crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection
entering narrower street canyon with dense red neon signage covering building facades

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and continuing down a narrow street lined with intense red neon signs

notable_agents.action: black car stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians to pass
person in yellow plaid shirt crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: Dense cluster of bright red neon signs and Japanese characters covering the building facades
Tall building facade creating a canyon wall on the left side of the narrow street
Tall building facade with multiple balconies and air units on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a yellow-striped crosswalk, passing a waiting black car and other pedestrians. Entering a narrow urban canyon, the environment becomes dominated by intense red neon signage covering the building facades on both sides. The street narrows significantly with tall buildings creating a corridor effect, while wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-drenched plaza into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow urban canyon. It begins in a rain-soaked open area dominated by the vibrant pink and cyan glow of Lizzie's Bar, where the camera glances up at a towering neon figure before moving toward the city street. As the character progresses past a parked white car, the open plaza gives way to a structured cityscape featuring a blue apartment tower and an elevated highway. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection, passing construction barriers and an overhead pedestrian bridge before crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, the environment narrows sharply as the camera enters a dense corridor of tall buildings, where the lighting transforms into an intense, saturated red from the signage lining the wet walls.
